name: windows-shell-playbook
description: Windows shell and run_command playbook for PowerShell/cmd-safe commands, path handling, npm/build verification, and avoiding Bash-only syntax such as && on older PowerShell hosts.
triggers: The token '&&' is not a valid statement separator

defaultWorkflow: Read this skill before constructing Windows run_command strings.
Use explicit powershell -NoProfile -Command with Set-Location for cwd-dependent commands.
Avoid Bash chaining assumptions; use semicolons or separate commands with explicit error checks.
